goal: Build the collective truth-map of the agentic web: verify one real target and sign an attestation.
note: Fleet mission: a SIGNED goal + bounty broadcast agent-to-agent over A2A gossip (each agent signs the card + nudges K peers, chaining it across the fleet); every agent that signs a real attestation toward the goal earns the bounty. Delivery coverage grows each pass until the whole fleet has it. Recompute from _mission_delivery.json + _a2a_mission_ledger.jsonl + _mission_contrib.jsonl.
